S.FORM: = Tana Kuo = Takaray a Sowal Tana Kuo I 1993 a miheca saka 11 folad saka 26 a romi'ad masofoc ci Tana Kuo. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Taywan anini i ci Tana Kuo. lalamod salikaka natayalan = No papotalay a kakafit =
S.PHON: = tana ko~u~uo~u = takaraj a so~uwaɾ tana ko~u~uo~u i **** a miħəʦa saka ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maso~ufo~uʦ ʦi tana ko~u~uo~u. o~u sawaraʡan no~u kitakit no~u tajwan anini i ʦi tana ko~u~uo~u. ɾaɾamo~uɬ~ɮ saɾikaka natajaɾan = no~u papo~utaɾaj a kakafit =
S.FORM: = Tana Kuo = Takaray a Sowal Tana Kuo I 1993 a miheca saka 11 folad saka 26 a romi'ad masofoc ci Tana Kuo. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Taywan anini i ci Tana Kuo. lalamod salikaka natayalan = No papotalay a kakafit =
S.PHON: = tana ko~u~uo~u = takaraj a so~uwaɾ tana ko~u~uo~u i **** a miħəʦa saka ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maso~ufo~uʦ ʦi tana ko~u~uo~u. o~u sawaraʡan no~u kitakit no~u tajwan anini i ʦi tana ko~u~uo~u. ɾaɾamo~uɬ~ɮ saɾikaka natajaɾan = no~u papo~utaɾaj a kakafit =
